content:
Save Our Rural Schools

A District 3 coalition working to keep Park County schools open and affordable through a fair consolidation plan. Read the proposal, check your bus route, and find out how to weigh in before the spring vote.
title: Save Our Rural Schools

content:
About the Proposal

The full draft plan: which schools consolidate, the timeline, the public hearing schedule, and the projected budget savings for District 3.
title: About the Proposal

content:
Bus Route Impact

Stop-by-stop maps and estimated ride times for every District 3 road under the proposed routing. If your road isn't listed, contact the board.
title: Bus Route Impact

content:
How to Help

Hearing dates, the sign-up form to speak, and a template letter to send the board. The most useful thing you can do is talk to your neighbors.
title: How to Help

content:
Op-Ed Archive

Letters and op-eds submitted to the Cody Enterprise on rural school consolidation, collected here for District 3 families.
title: Op-Ed Archive
